name: Egg Festival
description: The Egg Festival is held in the town square. Residents gather to hunt for painted eggs. The egg hunt starts at 9am — find the most eggs to win the Straw Hat!

name: Flower Dance
description: A traditional spring festival held in Cindersap Forest. Villagers dance together to celebrate the season. You can ask a villager with 4+ friendship hearts to dance with you.

name: Luau
description: The Luau is held at the beach. Bring a high-quality item to add to the communal soup pot — the Governor will rate it. Gold/Iridium quality or artisan goods earn the best reaction.

name: Dance of the Moonlight Jellies
description: A serene night festival on the beach where the villagers watch luminous jellyfish drift through the water. No gameplay significance — just a beautiful spectacle.

name: Stardew Valley Fair
description: An autumn fair held in the town square with minigames and a Grange Display competition. Gather 9 high-quality items of different categories to win Star Tokens, which you can spend on prizes including the Stardrop.

name: Spirit's Eve
description: A Halloween-themed festival held in the town at night. Navigate a maze to find the Golden Pumpkin, a rare gift. The maze is found east of the main square.

name: Festival of Ice
description: A winter festival at the forest with ice sculptures. Participate in the ice fishing competition — catch the most fish in the time limit to win a Glacierfish Jr. (in later years) or a Barbed Hook.

name: Night Market
description: The Night Market runs from Winter 15–17 on the beach at night. Browse rare items from visiting merchants, including the Mermaid Show and the Museum boat (rare artifacts).

name: Night Market (Day 2)
description: Second night of the Night Market. The submarine ride allows fishing for deep-sea fish including the Midnight Carp and Spook Fish.

name: Night Market (Day 3)
description: Final night of the Night Market. Last chance to purchase rare items and participate in events.

name: Feast of the Winter Star
description: A gift-giving festival held in the town square. Early in Winter you are assigned a secret gift recipient; give them a liked or loved gift to maximise friendship. You also receive a gift from your own secret admirer.

name: Kent
description: Kent's birthday. He loves Fiddlehead Risotto and Roasted Hazelnuts. Returns from war at the start of Year 2.

name: Vincent
description: Vincent's birthday. He loves Cranberry Candy, Ginger Ale, Grape, Pink Cake, and Snail.
